title: Newfoundland & Labrador Provincial Government Announces Support for Atlantic Hydrogen Alliance
content: The Honourable Steve Crocker, Minister of Industry, Energy and Technology, today announced $50,000 for the Atlantic Hydrogen Alliance to support a project advancing the development of Atlantic Canadaâ€™s hydrogen supply chain. In collaboration with project partners Energy NL, and Net-Zero Atlantic, the Atlantic Hydrogen Alliance will undertake a project to provide insight into the hydrogen supply chain in Atlantic Canada.
author: Analysts Account
